meaning: n.家族,相似,亲属关系,(用作复数)亲戚、族人adj.同族的,同类的,血缘的,类似的
examples: I recall many discussions with her on these and kindred topics.
We're only fifteen years old and kindred spirits.
- and sad, because he missed his heavenly kindred!
Lacking an official appraisal, you can try a kindred measure--the market capitalization of the REIT.
He says he has nothing against McCain, but he sees a kindred spirit in Obama.
